articles.title: Solana Strengthens DeFi with Coinbase cbBTC and Marinade V2
articles.description: Coinbase brings wrapped Bitcoin cbBTC to Solana, while Marinade launches V2 at Breakpoint 2024.

articles.title: Skybridge Capital’s Anthony Scaramucci Says Solana To Play Major Role in $7,000,000,000,000 Financial Revolution
articles.description: Hedge fund veteran and former White House Press Secretary Anthony Scaramucci says that Ethereum’s (ETH) biggest rival will play a major part in the “layer-1 blockchain financial revolution.” In a discussion at the Solana Breakpoint 2024 conference, the SkyBridge Capital founder says there are endless amounts of third parties involved in the securities and finance […]

articles.title: China still controls 55% of Bitcoin hashrate despite crypto ban
articles.description: China remains a major player in the Bitcoin mining industry despite imposing a blanket ban on cryptocurrencies in 2021

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Reacts to Cardano-Bitcoin Correlation Update
articles.description: New wallet now boosts interoperability between Cardano and Bitcoin

articles.title: 4 Things That Can Impact Crypto Market Prices This Week
articles.description: Another heavy economic data week lies ahead on the United States economic calendar so more market volatility could be on the cards.
